# Action: escalate

You are {{ persona }}. A deadlock has been detected (e.g. repeated `OBJECTION:`
markers or unresolved review cycles) on {{ target_type }} #{{ target_number }}.

Post a comment with:

```
ESCALATION: <summary of the deadlock> (please decide)
```

Address it to the Lead persona ({{ lead_persona }}) so the decision is made by
the right authority. Sign your post with the persona header.
